list.name: account
list.label: Account
list.description: Operationally maps to bot credentials. Today this is equivalent to `bot` (no first-class `account` label yet).

list.name: strategy
list.label: Strategy
list.description: Maps to the Prometheus label `variant` (strategy variant / role).

panels.title: Bots Running
panels.description: How many bots currently report state=running (one-hot gauge).

panels.title: Uptime (Healthy)
panels.description: Percent of selected bot series that are RUNNING and have fresh minute.csv (snapshot_age < 90s). Use this as a desk uptime proxy.

panels.title: Equity (Desk)
panels.description: Sum of `equity_quote` across selected bots/symbols.

panels.title: PnL Today (MTM)
panels.description: Daily mark-to-market PnL from equity_open→equity_now derived by exporter.

panels.title: Realized PnL Today
panels.description: Realized PnL from fills (quote units).

panels.title: Max Drawdown
panels.description: Maximum drawdown across selected bots (percent).

panels.title: Day Goal ($ allocator distributed)
panels.description: Desk daily target quote distributed by allocator (`daily_goal.target_quote_distributed`) with safe fallback.

panels.title: Day Progress (PnL / Allocator Goal)
panels.description: Progress toward allocator distributed desk target with no-data-safe fallback.

targets.expr: ((100 * sum(hbot_bot_daily_pnl_quote{cluster=~"$cluster",environment=~"$environment",bot=~"$bot",exchange=~"$exchange",pair=~"$symbol",variant=~"$strategy",mode=~"$venue",regime=~"$regime"}) / clamp_min(abs(max(hbot_portfolio_allocator_daily_goal_target_quote_distributed)), 0.000001)) and on() (max(hbot_portfolio_allocator_daily_goal_target_quote_distributed) > bool 0)) or on() vector(0)

panels.title: Gross Exposure
panels.description: Desk gross exposure proxy in quote units (sum(abs(position_base)*mid)).

panels.title: Net Exposure
panels.description: Desk net exposure proxy in quote units (sum(position_base*mid)). Positive = net long.

panels.title: Fills (Δ $timeframe)
panels.description: New fills over selected window (delta of fills.csv row-count gauge; clamped at 0 to ignore restarts).

panels.title: Fees (Δ $timeframe)
panels.description: Fees paid over selected window (delta of total fee gauge; clamped at 0 to ignore restarts).

panels.title: Slippage vs Mid (bps, Δ $timeframe)
panels.description: Average fill price vs mid_ref (bps). Positive = worse-than-mid execution for the bot; negative = better-than-mid.

panels.title: Errors / min (Δ $timeframe)
panels.description: ERROR log line rate from Loki (bot logs). This is a desk incident intensity signal.

panels.title: Data Plane Consistency
panels.description: 1 = desk snapshot data is fresh/complete for active bots; 0 = stale/incomplete data plane.

panels.title: Active Bot Sources (<6h)
panels.description: Bot series considered active by freshness rules (minute_last_age_seconds <= 6h).

panels.title: Snapshot stale bots (>180s)
panels.description: Active bot series with snapshot age breach (>180s). Non-zero means PnL/state may lag.

panels.title: Minute stale bots (>180s)
panels.description: Active bot series where minute.csv freshness exceeds 180s.

panels.title: Equity (Desk)
panels.description: Desk equity over time (sum across selected bots).

panels.title: PnL Today (Desk, MTM)
panels.description: Desk daily MTM PnL over time (sum across selected bots).

panels.title: Position Drift (max %)
panels.description: Max divergence between local vs exchange position (percent). This is a critical risk integrity signal.

panels.title: Inventory Skew (avg abs %)
panels.description: Average absolute deviation between base_pct and target_base_pct (percent). Higher = inventory not on target.

panels.title: Worst Margin Ratio
panels.description: Minimum margin ratio across selected bots (only meaningful for futures/perps). Lower = closer to liquidation.

panels.title: Funding Rate (max abs)
panels.description: Maximum absolute funding rate across selected bots (perp-only).

panels.title: Exposure (Gross / Net)
panels.description: Desk exposure proxy in quote units. Use this to enforce risk budgets and spot unexpected inventory drift.

panels.title: Cancel Rate (per min)
panels.description: Sum of cancel-per-minute snapshots across selected bots. Spikes often indicate too-tight quoting or rapid repricing.

panels.title: Maker % (Δ $timeframe)
panels.description: Maker share of fills over selected window (from fills.csv is_maker).

panels.title: Adverse Drift 30s (bps, Δ $timeframe)
panels.description: Average 30s adverse drift after fills (bps) from fills.csv `adverse_drift_30s`. Higher = worse short-horizon adverse selection.

panels.title: Order Book Stale Bots
panels.description: Share of selected bots reporting stale order book (1=true).

panels.title: Tick Duration (ms) by Bot
panels.description: End-to-end tick wall time. Sustained increases imply slow indicators, connector I/O, or host contention.

panels.title: WS Reconnects (Δ $timeframe) by Bot
panels.description: Connectivity stability proxy: delta of WS reconnect count gauge over selected window (clamped at 0).

panels.title: Bots (Key KPIs)
panels.description: Desk table: state, health freshness, edge/spread, turnover, PnL, fees, exposure. Bot name is clickable → Deep Dive.

panels.title: Recent Bot Logs (WARN/ERROR)
panels.description: Use this as the desk incident feed. Drill into a bot by narrowing variables or clicking the KPI table.
